def positive_same_contextmanager_pattern_copied_across_modules():
    rule_id = "same_contextmanager_pattern_copied_across_modules"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag duplicate context manager behavior implemented in several modules."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
